title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor discusses how companies typically plateau at 40% productivity gains with AI coding assistants and proposes that the bottleneck lies across the entire SDLC rather than code writing alone. The talk covers Cursor's deployment of multiple agent systems for bug triage, security review, growth experimentation, and PM/EM tasks, along with organizational changes needed for the agent era.
